name: TiAu Refractory Variant
description: Reduce Au dependency by using heavier refractory stack and thicker Ti lattice.
tradeoff_notes: Lower gold demand; higher refractory demand.
Slightly higher credit fabrication overhead.

name: Oxide Stack Cloak Matrix
description: Use oxide-rich metamaterial layers to reduce gallium pressure at the cost of added ceramics.
tradeoff_notes: Lower Ga usage; more Al/Si and Nb process support.
Slight increase in assembly credits.

name: Boron Weave Shield Mesh
description: Increase boron-carbide layering to reduce hafnium and niobium dependency in shield lattice fabrication.
tradeoff_notes: Lower Hf/Nb use in constrained markets.
Higher boron and carbon feedstock demand.

name: Pd-Saver Cognitive Core
description: Photonic matrix routing variant that lowers Pd and shifts toward gold and silicon volume.
tradeoff_notes: Lower Pd demand in constrained markets.
Higher Si wafer and Au interconnect demand.

name: Graphene Bus Casimir Core
description: Shift cavity bus architecture to graphene-rich conductors, reducing niobium and gold pressure.
tradeoff_notes: Lower Au/Nb use in reactor production runs.
Higher copper and carbon throughput requirements.

name: Optical Bus ER=EPR Relay
description: Switch relay bus to optical-heavy architecture to mitigate platinum bottlenecks.
tradeoff_notes: Lower Pt dependency.
Higher Ge and Si optical substrate usage.

name: Tantalum-Saver Shear Damper
description: Retune inertial dampers toward titanium-niobium framing to reduce reliance on tantalum-heavy parts.
tradeoff_notes: Lower Ta/Re dependency.
Higher Ti/Nb/W machining demand.

name: Composite Settler Frame
description: Use mixed alloy composites for early scout hulls to reduce primary iron load.
tradeoff_notes: Lower Fe requirement for starter hull builds.
Higher aluminum and carbon composite demand.

name: Fiber Backbone Logistics Node
description: Fiber-optic and ceramic relay backbone that trims copper bus demand.
tradeoff_notes: Lower copper dependency for logistics expansion.
Higher silicon/aluminum and ceramic process load.

name: Ceramic Truss Lensing Station
description: Shift wormhole lens support to ceramic truss assemblies to reduce platinum bottlenecks.
tradeoff_notes: Lower Pt demand for deep-space lensing builds.
Higher Nb/Hf/Ta precision metallurgy demand.

name: Iridium-Saver Anchor Truss
description: Replace part of iridium cluster with molybdenum/tantalum truss reinforcement.
tradeoff_notes: Lower Ir use for swarm anchor builds.
Higher Mo/Ta metallurgy requirement.

name: Carbon-Lattice Stealth Path
description: Research variant emphasizing carbon-lattice absorber design to reduce platinum exposure.
tradeoff_notes: Lower Pt and Ga requirement in stealth R&D.
Higher carbon and silicon process burden.

name: Low-Power Cognition Path
description: Research route emphasizing efficient inference hardware and moderated reactor burden.
tradeoff_notes: Lower Ga/In requirements.
Higher C and Si process envelope.

name: Modular Swarm Fabrication Path
description: Research route favoring modular scaffold automation over precious-metal-heavy control assemblies.
tradeoff_notes: Lower Au and Re exposure in mega-structure research.
Higher Fe/Si/C process and tooling requirements.

name: Carbide Repair Route
description: Research path emphasizing carbide scaffold durability over palladium-rich swarm catalysts.
tradeoff_notes: Lower Pd demand.
Higher C and Ti process burden.

name: Rare-Gas Envelope Route
description: Build variant that shifts shield plasma stability toward noble-gas control loops.
tradeoff_notes: Lower Nb/Ta tooling pressure.
Higher Xe/Kr storage requirement.

name: Ceramic Frame Barge Path
description: Hull route favoring ceramic-composite spars to reduce nickel-heavy frame dependency.
tradeoff_notes: Lower Ni and Co usage.
Higher Si/C and refractory ceramic processing.

name: Mass-Lite Interdictor Path
description: Interdictor frame option reducing heavy tungsten armor in exchange for advanced truss geometry.
tradeoff_notes: Lower W requirement.
Higher Ti/C truss fabrication demand.

name: Dense-Stealth Runner Path
description: Stealth runner design prioritizing signature suppression at the cost of additional rare coating inputs.
tradeoff_notes: Better stealth material stack.
Higher Pt/Ga procurement exposure.

name: Tantalum Lens Route
description: Projector lens stack that substitutes tantalum-rich phase meshes for iridium-heavy emitter rings.
tradeoff_notes: Lower Ir usage.
Higher Ta/Nb precision machining.

name: Tungsten Ramfield Route
description: Manufacturing route pushing dense tungsten penetrator tolerances for improved ballistic coherence.
tradeoff_notes: Higher W and Mo demand.
Lower Ti and C processing complexity.

name: Nitride Lock Route
description: Rebalances lock-core fabrication toward nitride layers and lower silver bus fractions.
tradeoff_notes: Lower Ag requirement.
Higher Y/Ba/Cu ceramic superconductor burden.

name: Safety-First Capsule Route
description: Research route that expands containment redundancy and reduces fissile capsule density per unit.
tradeoff_notes: Lower Pu demand in research prototypes.
Higher Pt/Ir containment instrumentation requirements.

name: Catalyst Preheater Route
description: Front-loads thermal preconditioning arrays to reduce rare-field igniter material stress.
tradeoff_notes: Lower Re/Hf igniter burden.
Higher Xe/Kr conditioning demand.

name: Adaptive Fabricator Core Mk5 Alternate Route
description: Alternative fabrication route that trades scarce high-purity feedstock for higher bulk-material throughput.
tradeoff_notes: Reduces pressure on the primary high-volume element in this blueprint.
Increases dependence on secondary feedstocks and process overhead.
